The ''' E-60R missile launchers''' were used by [[assault battle droid]]s of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Description==
[[File:AssaultBattleDroidE60RMissileLauncher-Databank.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An assault battle droid sighting an E-60.]]
[[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]] E-60R [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launchers]] were anti-armor projectile pieces used by [[assault battle droid]]s.<ref name="BF I guide" /> They fired one [[Missile/Legends|missile]], and the assault [[Droid/Legends|droids]] carried 6 in reserve.<ref name="BF I" /> A variety of munitions could be used with the launcher. In a cost-cutting measure, the launchers were equipped with surplus viewfinder scopes, forcing the droids to manually aim.<ref name="Databank" /> The rockets were capable of homing in on a target at close range.<ref name="BF I" />

==History==
After [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] heavy vehicles failed to stop the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] designed the inexpensive yet effective missile launcher to support the tanks of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Droid Army]].<ref name="Databank" /> The E60 served in many battles during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BF II">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The E-60R missile launcher serves as the battle droid's rocket launcher in the ''[[Battlefront]]'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series.
